Historic Setting: Hotel le Fenil in Celles offers a 3-star experience within a historic building. The property features a sun terrace, garden, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms include private bathrooms with walk-in showers, hairdryers, work desks, and TVs. Additional amenities include ground-floor units, seating areas, and free on-site parking.
Dining Experience: Guests enjoy a continental buffet breakfast with local specialities, fresh pastries, cheese, fruits, and juice. The modern, romantic restaurant serves French, Belgian, and local cuisines, accommodating vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free diets.
Activities and Attractions: The hotel offers fishing, skiing, walking tours, bike tours, hiking, and cycling.
